informal_pl: arcosh x = ln(x + √(x²-1)) dla x ≥ 1. Paper używa hypot z √(-1); my dla domeny rzeczywistej stosujemy bezpośrednio postać podręcznikową.
informal_en: arcosh x = ln(x + √(x²-1)) for x ≥ 1. Paper uses hypot with √(-1); for the real domain we use the textbook form directly.
lean_target_signature: theorem emlterm1_for_arcosh : ∃ t : EMLTerm₁, ∀ x : ℝ, 1 ≤ x → EMLTerm₁.eval x t = Real.arcosh x := by sorry
notes: Round 2 chunk; Table S2 step 28. Paper's recipe via complex i diverges from the strictly-real Lean form; we adopt textbook ln(x+√(x²-1)) under x ≥ 1.
